zh.Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Tunstall II於大約1395年出生在英國藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素時，他的父親Sir Thomas Tunstall36歲，母親Isabel Harington28歲。他於1427年2月18日之前與Eleanor FitzHugh結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年之前在英國藍卡爾普雷斯可特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Tunstall II于大约1395年出生在英国藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Tunstall36岁，母亲Isabel Harington28岁。他于1427年2月18日之前与Eleanor FitzHugh结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1435年之前在英国藍卡爾普雷斯可特。

nameMeanings.name: Tunstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tūn-stall ‘site of a farm, farmstead’, notably Tunstall (Lancashire) and one or more of many Staffordshire places (Tunstall near Stoke on Trent, Tunstall near Adbaston, and four places called Dunstall), but also Tunstall Farm in Mountfield (Sussex) and possibly also Tunstall (Durham, Kent, Norfolk, Shropshire, Suffolk, east and North Yorkshire), and Dunstall (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Tunstill
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Tunstall  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Tunstall II was born about 1395, in Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Tunstall, was 36 and his mother, Isabel Harington, was 28. He married Eleanor FitzHugh before 18 February 1427. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 1435, in Prescot, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Tunstall II est né environ 1395, à Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Tunstall, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabel Harington, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor FitzHugh avant 18 février 1427. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 1435, à Prescot, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Tunstall II um 1395 in Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Tunstall 36 und seine Mutter Isabel Harington 28. Er hat vor 18. Februar 1427 Eleanor FitzHugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 1435 in Prescot, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tunstall II è nato il circa 1395 nel Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Tunstall, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Harington, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor FitzHugh prima del 18 febbraio 1427. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1435, nel Prescot, Lancashire, England.

ja.Prescot, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアプレスコト
ja.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアトゥンスタル

ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Tunstall IIが約1395年にイギリスランカシュアイアスウルランド カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Tunstallは36歳，母Isabel Haringtonは28歳であった。1427年2月18日以前にEleanor FitzHughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1435年以前にイギリスランカシュアイアプレスコトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Tunstall II(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 랭카실르 스를랜드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Tunstall(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Harington(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1427년 2월 18일 이전 Eleanor FitzHugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 이전 영국 랭카실르 프레스컷에서 사망했다.

mn.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: Tunstall, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tunstall II nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Tunstall, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Harington, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor FitzHugh antes 18 de fevereiro de 1427. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1435, em Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Tunstall II родился около 1395 г. в местности турланд кастл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Tunstall было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Harington, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor FitzHugh перед 18 февраль 1427 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 1435 г. в местности прескот, ланкашир, Англия.

sm.about 1395–before 1435: e tusa o le 1395–a'e le'I oo le 1435

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Tunstall II nació aproximadamente 1395, en Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Tunstall, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Isabel Harington, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Eleanor FitzHugh antes de 18 de febrero de 1427. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1435, en Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
